calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-03-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-03-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Matha Guzman, Esq., for Plaintiff: Discover Bank fka Green Wood Trust.
No appearance by the Defendant: Andrew J. Knox.
09:25 am. - Counsel present with declaration of Robert Adkins, the Account Manager.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant: Andrew J. Knox as follows:
Principal amount of $11,089.83
Interest in the amount of $1,206.21
Attorney's Fees of $675.00
Costs of $173.00
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2004 Set For Trial On May-03-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-21-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appeared for plaintiff. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by Jo Ann Prior, CSR 129. (212)
